option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:10.0 AS base USER $APP_UID WORKDIR /app
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:10.0 AS build ARG BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Release WORKDIR /src COPY ["Soundmarine.server/Soundmarine.server.csproj", "Soundmarine.server/"] COPY ["Soundmarine.lib/Soundmarine.lib.csproj", "Soundmarine.lib/"] RUN dotnet restore "Soundmarine.server/Soundmarine.server.csproj" COPY . . WORKDIR "/src/Soundmarine.server" RUN dotnet build "./Soundmarine.server.csproj" -c $BUILD_CONFIGURATION -o /app/build
FROM build AS publish ARG BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Release RUN dotnet publish "./Soundmarine.server.csproj" -c $BUILD_CONFIGURATION -o /app/publish /p:UseAppHost=false
FROM base AS final WORKDIR /app COPY --from=publish /app/publish . ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "Soundmarine.server.dll"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:10.0 AS base RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y libvips42 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* USER $APP_UID WORKDIR /app
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:10.0 AS build ARG BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Release WORKDIR /src COPY ["Soundmarine.server/Soundmarine.server.csproj", "Soundmarine.server/"] COPY ["Soundmarine.lib/Soundmarine.lib.csproj", "Soundmarine.lib/"] RUN dotnet restore "Soundmarine.server/Soundmarine.server.csproj" COPY . . WORKDIR "/src/Soundmarine.server" RUN dotnet build "./Soundmarine.server.csproj" -c $BUILD_CONFIGURATION -o /app/build
FROM build AS publish ARG BUILD_CONFIGURATION=Release RUN dotnet publish "./Soundmarine.server.csproj" -c $BUILD_CONFIGURATION -o /app/publish /p:UseAppHost=false
FROM base AS final WORKDIR /app COPY --from=publish /app/publish . ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "Soundmarine.server.dll"]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
services: soundmarine-server: container_name: soundmarine.server image: soundmarine.server build: context: . dockerfile: Soundmarine.server/Dockerfile ports: - "8080:8080" user: "1000:1000" volumes: - /home/pinkcandy/ss/data:/data - /home/pinkcandy/SoulSeek:/music depends_on: soundmarine-postgress: condition: service_healthy
soundmarine-postgress: container_name: soundmarine.postgress image: postgres:16 environment: POSTGRES_PASSWORD: haslo123 ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - /home/pinkcandy/ss/data/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: soundmarine-server: container_name: soundmarine.server image: soundmarine.server build: context: . dockerfile: Soundmarine.server/Dockerfile ports: - "8080:8080" user: root volumes: - /home/pinkcandy/ss/data:/data - /home/pinkcandy/SoulSeek:/music depends_on: soundmarine-postgress: condition: service_healthy
soundmarine-postgress: container_name: soundmarine.postgress image: postgres:16 environment: POSTGRES_PASSWORD: haslo123 ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - /home/pinkcandy/ss/data/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
